post.content:
Anyone who is giving uber interviews or are planning to switch to uber, dont join uber(if mental peace matters to you), its work culture sucks, your team will ping you as early as 7 am in the morning and it can go upto 10pm at night, they won't spare you on weekends as well.
Managers dont have empathy they will scold you like a 5 year old in front of everyone .

I am myself a new joiner and I am regretting my decision. I am at the verge of a mental breakdown and I dont know what to do.

Since a lot of people are asking about the role and Location :- 

Role  - SDE-2
Location :- Hyderabad
Sounds like the job of an Uber driver
work culture depends on people u asssosiate with and ur team. not whole company\n
Can you please mention the location or team if possible?

Hey Anonymous, I have the job offer from Uber as well (same SDE 2 backend role)\nIs it possible to ping you, since I haven\'t resigned from the current company yet and I want to make an informed decision.
what is your YOE and which position are you on in uber?\n
They have a very high base pay, right ? they will suck the life out of you.
is the team backend based or frontent? I have an interview coming up this week
